series_metadata.series_title: Active Insurance Company Records - Insurance Companies. Rate Service Organizations and Residual Markets
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents consists of insurance company, rate service organization and Residual Market records. This series includes but is not limited to rules, rates, and forms submitted for compliance with Title 38.2 of the Code of Virginia.

retention_rules.trigger_event: ". in agency superseded record series XXXXXX," Materials from Insurance Companies" or XXXXXX, Materials from Rate service Organizations and Residual Markets

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents insurance company requests for a rate in excess of the filed rate due to unspecified circumstances and documents State Corporation Commission approval of those rates in accordance with §§ 38.2-1920 and 2013 of the Code of Virginia.
This series documents the disapproval of insurance company submissions by the Commission.

This series consists of dormant records of insurance companies. This series includes but is not limited to: correspondence, inactive or obsolete rules, rates, forms and other supplementary documentation submitted by insurers that are at least 5 years old but have not been formally superseded by the insurers. These materials are used for reference purposes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: from end of calendar year becoming inactive

series_metadata.series_title: Inactive Insurance Company Records - Insurance Companies, Rate Service Organizations and Residual Markets
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of inactive records from insurance companies, rate service organization and Residual Markets. This series includes but is not limited to documents submitted by entities whose licenses have been withdrawn or revoked and remaining materials from the non-surviving entity after a merger Code of Virginia 38.2 et.seq.

retention_rules.trigger_event: from end of calendar year becoming inactive

series_metadata.series_title: Licensing Materials for Rate Service Organizations and Joint Underwriting Organizations or Associations
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of compliance documents (licensing materials) by Rate Service Organizations and Joint Underwriting Organizations/Associations: This series includes but is not limited to inactive or replaced compliance documents submitted under the provisions of §§ 38.2-1914, 38.2-1915 and 38.2-2002 of the Code of Virginia.

retention_rules.trigger_event: from end of calendar year becoming obsolete

series_metadata.series_title: Materials from Insurance Companies This series consist of rules, rates, and forms submitted by insurance companies.
Materials from Rate Service Organziations and Residual Markets This series consist of Rate Service Organization and Residual Market submissions.

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents fines, payment and settlements of penalties against insurers imposed by the Commission under the provisions of § 38.2-218 of the Code of Virginia. Includes settlements, agreements, copies of checks and related correspondence.

series_metadata.series_title: Statistical Records from Rate Service Organizations: Non NCCI (National Council of Compensation Insurers)
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of statistical records from Rate Service Organizations(non NCCI). This series includes but is not limited to superseded statistical information and compilations submitted under the provisions of sections 38.2-1919 and 38.2-2012, Code of Virginia.

This series documents distributions of funds to insurers. DMV collects a fee charged to uninsured motorists and the Commission distributes the fees to insurers under the provisions of Code of Virginia, § 38.2-3001.

retention_rules.trigger_event: distribution or completion of audit, whichever is greater

series_metadata.series_title: Virginia Property Insurance Association (VPIA) Declination Reports
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of VPIA declination of individuals requests for coverage. This series includes but is not limited to reports from VPIA declining coverage of property, theft or liability exposures due to risks that do not meet VPIA's eligibility criteria. Refer to Code of Virginia, § 38.2-2705.

retention_rules.trigger_event: from of calendar year becoming obsolete in compliance with No. 8 on schedule cover page
